description: Configure the corporate travel Chrome browser according to the IT specification. Organize the loose list of 30 airline and hotel bookmarks into specific alliance folders. Configure global security settings to block third-party cookies, block popups, and disable the password manager. Add site-specific exceptions for Concur and Amadeus, create a custom flight-tracking search engine shortcut, and set the startup behavior.
instruction: A browser configuration specification is located at ~/Desktop/travel_workspace_spec.txt. Read it carefully. You must organize the 30 loose bookmarks into the 4 specified folders, apply the global security policies, configure the site-specific exceptions for the enterprise booking portals, add the 'fa' custom search engine for FlightAware, and configure the startup behavior. Precision matters.
